quiz.title: SSC Stenographer Complete Collection
quiz.description: Collection of 537 questions from SSC Stenographer documents

questions.question: Which Indian state recently became the first to launch an exclusive "AI-Powered Climate Risk Map" for its coastal districts in 2026?

options.B: Send a manned mission to the International Space Station
options.C: Send Indian astronauts into a Low Earth Orbit
